help.frigate.enabled: Enable the Frigate NVR integration so the agent can inspect cameras, events, reviews, media, and system health.
help.frigate.readonly: Keep Frigate access read-only. This blocks future mutating actions such as deleting events or saving configuration changes.
help.frigate.url: Base URL of your Frigate instance, for example https://frigate.local:8971 or http://frigate:5000 on an internal Docker network.
help.frigate.api_token: Bearer API token for authenticated Frigate access. Stored securely in the encrypted vault and never written to config.yaml.
help.frigate.internal_port: Use Frigate’s internal unauthenticated port 5000. Only enable this on trusted Docker-internal networks.
help.frigate.insecure: Skip TLS certificate verification for self-signed certificates. Only use this inside trusted local networks.
help.frigate.default_camera: Optional camera name used when the agent queries camera-specific data without specifying a camera.
help.frigate.event_relay: Subscribe to Frigate MQTT event messages and relay them to the agent when MQTT relay is configured.
help.frigate.review_relay: Subscribe to Frigate MQTT review messages and relay review updates to the agent when MQTT relay is configured.
help.frigate.store_media: Allow AuraGo to store fetched snapshots or clips in the media registry when media storage support is used.
help.frigate.mqtt_topic_prefix: MQTT topic prefix used by Frigate. The default is frigate, producing topics such as frigate/events and frigate/reviews.
